title: Deliciously Spicy Kenyan Prune Kebabs
description: A spicy and fluffy Kenyan dish featuring prunes, perfect for kids and adults alike, made with score-fat and nut-free friendly ingredients, grilled to perfection on a robata-grill.
instructions: Preheat the robata-grill to medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together the melted score-fat, onion, garlic, ginger, cumin, coriander, cayenne pepper, salt, and black pepper.
Add the prunes to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the prunes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each prune.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the prunes are tender and lightly charred.
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro if desired.
Let the kebabs rest for a few minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite side dishes, such as rice or naan bread.
